name: Maya Launcher
description: Launches Maya with the linked executable (via Software Linker), auto-setting the project to the repo root, and assembles Maya env vars from its 7 nested tools (AdvancedSkeleton, MayaNgSkin, MayaToolkit, mGear, Ukore Browser, DreamwallPicker, StudioLibrary) based on which are enabled for the active repo.
